texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: 2025 Non- Résidents Ground Package
texts.text: 2025 Non- Résidents Ground Package

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Salt Lick Safari Lodge has long been a cornerstone of Kenya's hospitality industry, renowned as one of the country's premier lodges and earning its place among the World's Most Photographed Lodges. Drawing travelers seeking unparalleled accommodations, this luxurious safari retreat is nestled in the picturesque Taita Hills Wildlife Sanctuary. From its vantage point, guests are treated to breathtaking views of a bustling waterhole and the expansive Tsavo plains, creating an unforgettable safari experience.
texts.text: Salt Lick Safari Lodge has long been a cornerstone of Kenya's hospitality industry, renowned as one of the country's premier lodges and earning its place among the World's Most Photographed Lodges. Drawing travelers seeking unparalleled accommodations, this luxurious safari retreat is nestled in the picturesque Taita Hills Wildlife Sanctuary. From its vantage point, guests are treated to breathtaking views of a bustling waterhole and the expansive Tsavo plains, creating an unforgettable safari experience.

texts.orig: · For Safety Reasons: Salt Lick Safari Lodge has a strict age policy prohibiting children under the age of 5 years from staying at the lodge. This policy is implemented for safety reasons due to the lodge's unique structural and environmental characteristics.

texts.orig: ONE NIGHT PACKAGE!

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The One Night Package at Salt Lick Safari Lodge offers an all-inclusive experience combining accommodation, meals, transport, game drives, and a unique cultural visit. Here's a detailed breakdown of what the package includes:
texts.text: The One Night Package at Salt Lick Safari Lodge offers an all-inclusive experience combining accommodation, meals, transport, game drives, and a unique cultural visit. Here's a detailed breakdown of what the package includes:

texts.text: Accommodation & Meals

texts.orig: · One Night Full-Board Accommodation : Enjoy a comfortable stay with all meals included (breakfast, lunch, and dinner).
texts.text: One Night Full-Board Accommodation : Enjoy a comfortable stay with all meals included (breakfast, lunch, and dinner).

texts.label: list_item

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Return Transfers in Voi : Private transfers from the Voi train station to the resort and back.
texts.text: Return Transfers in Voi : Private transfers from the Voi train station to the resort and back.

texts.orig: Activities
texts.text: Activities

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Two Game Drives : Experience wildlife up close with two scheduled game drives in the sanctuary.
texts.text: Two Game Drives : Experience wildlife up close with two scheduled game drives in the sanctuary.
